0.name: the emergency hatch
0.description: An emergency maintenance hatch. Cold recycled air seeps through. The service corridor lies beyond.

0.name: the supply crate
0.description: A heavy metal supply crate, wedged against the hatch. Blast it or shove it aside.

0.name: your research tablet
0.description: Your cracked research tablet. Last entry: 'Teleporter collapse - field inverted. I'm in the restricted sectors. Must reach the surface via the Generator Room before lockdown seals. - Dr. Cosor'

1.name: the generator room door
1.description: A heavy blast door propped open with a fire extinguisher. The generator room roars beyond.

1.name: the maintenance hatch
1.description: The hatch back to the containment bay.

1.name: the live wiring
1.description: High-voltage wiring torn from the ceiling. The air smells of ozone. You cannot pass without a shield.

1.name: the live wiring
1.description: High-voltage wiring torn from the ceiling. The air smells of ozone. You cannot pass without a shield.

1.name: the live wiring
1.description: High-voltage wiring torn from the ceiling. The air smells of ozone. You cannot pass without a shield.

1.name: the engineer's note
1.description: A handwritten note: 'Explosion ripped through the corridor. Wiring unsafe - entire junction is live. Push something heavy through first. - Chief Engineer Walsh'

1.name: the supply crate
1.description: A heavy supply crate. It could shield you from the live wiring if you push it through first.

2.name: the maintenance shaft hatch
2.description: A cramped maintenance shaft hatch. The ladder inside leads toward the surface levels.

2.name: the corridor door
2.description: The blast door back to the service corridor.

2.name: the exhaust vent
2.description: A malfunctioning coolant exhaust vent. Superheated steam - impassable without a crate to shield you.

2.name: the supply crate
2.description: A heavy supply crate. Push it into a vent column to shield your crossing.

2.name: the supply crate
2.description: A heavy supply crate. Push it into a vent column to shield your crossing.

2.name: the generator core
2.description: The main generator core powering the facility lockdown. Massively reinforced - shoot it repeatedly if you want it gone, or find a way around it.

2.name: the maintenance log
2.description: Chief Engineer Walsh's log: 'Coolant breaches on both sides of the generator. Push a crate through each vent column first - the crate absorbs the steam long enough to cross safely.'

3.name: the surface elevator
3.description: The surface elevator. One button: UP. Freedom is one floor above.

3.name: the shaft door
3.description: The maintenance shaft door back to the generator room.

3.name: the security drone
3.description: An autonomous security drone hovering in the corridor. It's blocking the way. Shoot it down - your projectiles pass through the laser grids.

3.name: the laser grid
3.description: An automated laser grid spanning the full corridor. Push a crate into it to cross safely.

3.name: the security terminal
3.description: A facility terminal: 'INTRUDER ALERT - Dr. Cosor, unauthorized access. Drone deployed at sector junction. Laser grids active. Elevator access: GRANTED (emergency protocol). Note: projectiles are unaffected by laser grids.'
